componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Warning! Primary Country is on the sanctioned country list.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: The report chart below presents Gross Revenue and Total Cost (converted to Corporate Currency) by Servicing Entity; based on Closed Won Opportunities where current record is the Servicing Account.

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Live Servicing Entities by Gross Revenue and Total Cost

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: The report chart below presents Gross Revenue and Total Cost (converted to Corporate Currency) by Contracting Entity; based on Closed Won Opportunities where current record is the Contracting Account.

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Live Contracting Entities by Gross Revenue and Total Cost

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: The report chart below presents Gross Revenue and Total Cost (converted to Corporate Currency) by Billing Entity; based on Closed Won Opportunities where current record is the Billing Account.

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Live Billing Entities by Gross Revenue and Total Cost

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: The “Current Annual Gross Revenue (Won)" includes both recurring fees and one-off/adhoc fees, but only if the current year is the first year of the opportunity (“Opportunity year 1”). Only Closed Won Opportunities data is shown.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: The “Current Year Opportunities Value” includes both recurring fees and one-off/ad-hoc fees for Opportunities where the Close Date is in the current calendar year (any Stage).

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: The “Next Financial Year Opportunities Value” includes both recurring fees and one-off/ad-hoc fees for Opportunities where the Commencement Date is in the next calendar year (any Opportunity Stage).
